design_brief_requirements: Remove the Overhead (OH) LV cable currently located between pole ref '23' and pole ref '20' on the southern side of Elizabeth Drive
String a new OH cable between pole ref '3' and pole ref '20' on the northern side of Elizabeth Drive
Ensure all LV service works comply with the NSW Service and Installation Rules
Confirm the design adheres to Endeavour Energy standards MDI0031 and MCI0005
New OH road crossing service connection intended to maintain existing services
Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11
Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection
All other works required (Customer Funded Contestable Works)
Land Interests as specified in the Land Interest Guidelines (LIG) are required for this project
site_plan_scope_found: REMOVE CONDUCTOR - represented by dotted line symbol in legend, consistent with removing existing OH LV cable between poles
STRING NEW OH CABLE - represented by short dashed line symbol in legend, consistent with stringing new OH cable between pole ref '3' and pole ref '20'
EXISTING OH CABLE - represented by solid thin line symbol, provides context for existing overhead network
EXISTING POLE - represented by small solid black filled circle, consistent with pole references '23', '20', '3'
EXISTING DUCTS - represented by thick heavy solid black line, provides context for existing HV duct infrastructure

missing_from_site_plan.item: Specific pole references '23', '20', and '3' explicitly labelled on site plan
missing_from_site_plan.note: The legend confirms the symbol types for existing poles and OH cable stringing but there is no site plan data confirming that poles are individually identified with reference numbers '23', '20', or '3' on the drawing.

missing_from_site_plan.item: New OH road crossing service connection
missing_from_site_plan.note: No legend symbol or site plan entry corresponds specifically to a new OH road crossing service connection. This work item is absent from the legend entries and site plan data provided.

missing_from_site_plan.item: Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11
missing_from_site_plan.note: While EXISTING DUCTS appears in the legend, there is no legend symbol or site plan representation for a new or spare HV duct to be installed as part of this project scope.

missing_from_site_plan.design_brief_reference: Determination of Funding, page 4 (inferred from HV duct and duct usage charge items)
missing_from_site_plan.note: Although NEW HV TRENCH is present in the legend as a symbol type, there is no site plan data record confirming this symbol is actually used on the drawing in relation to the described HV duct works.

Network switching is listed as a customer-funded non-contestable work item in the Design Brief but no corresponding symbol (e.g. HV ABS N/C or HV USL N/C switching points) is confirmed as present in the site plan data beyond the legend definitions.
Substation commissioning is referenced in the Design Brief but no substation symbol (PADMOUNT SUBSTATION or POLE SUBSTATION) is confirmed as placed on the site plan in the data provided.

missing_from_site_plan.item: Compliance with NSW Service and Installation Rules, MDI0031, and MCI0005
missing_from_site_plan.note: These are regulatory and standards compliance requirements stated in the Design Brief. They are not represented by any symbol or notation visible in the site plan legend or site plan data.

missing_from_site_plan.item: Land Interests / Easements as per Land Interest Guidelines (LIG)
missing_from_site_plan.note: While ENDEAVOUR ENERGY EASEMENT appears as a boundary symbol in the legend, there is no site plan data record confirming easement boundaries are actually shown on the drawing for this project.

method_of_supply_comparison.summary: The Design Brief outlines a scope that includes LV overhead cable removal between poles 23 and 20, stringing of new OH cable between poles 3 and 20, a new OH road crossing service connection, spare HV duct installation, duct usage charges, network switching, substation commissioning, contestable works, compliance with multiple standards, and land interest requirements. The site plan legend data supports two primary LV work items: removal of conductor and stringing of new OH cable, consistent with the Design Brief's LV scope. However, the site plan data is insufficient or absent for several key items including: specific pole reference identification on the drawing, the new OH road crossing service connection, spare HV duct works, network switching points, substation presence and commissioning scope, standards compliance notations, and confirmed easement delineation. Five of the ten identified Design Brief requirements have no adequate representation in the available site plan data, and three more are only partially supported by legend symbol definitions without confirmed placement on the drawing.

design_brief_funded_works: Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11 (Endeavour Energy capital contribution)
Duct usage charge as required (Customer reimbursement to Endeavour Energy)
Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection (Customer funded non-contestable works)

All other works required - Customer funded contestable works (including LV works: remove OH LV cable between pole ref 23 and pole ref 20 on southern side of Elizabeth Drive; string new OH cable between pole ref 3 and pole ref 20 on northern side of Elizabeth Drive; new OH road crossing service connection)
drawing_scope_found: Remove OH LV cable between poles - represented in legend by 'REMOVE CONDUCTOR' (Dotted line) and 'EXISTING POLE' (Small solid black filled circle) and 'REMOVE POLE' (Small solid black filled circle with large X through it)
String new OH cable between poles - represented in legend by 'STRING NEW OH CABLE' (Short dashed line) and 'EXISTING POLE' / 'NEW POLE' symbols
Existing overhead cable infrastructure - represented by 'EXISTING OH CABLE' (Solid thin line)
Existing underground/duct infrastructure - represented by 'EXISTING DUCTS' (Thick heavy solid black line) and 'EXISTING UNDERGROUND MAINS' (Alternating long-short dashed line)

missing_from_drawing.item: Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11
missing_from_drawing.design_brief_reference: Determination of Funding, page 4 - capital contribution by Endeavour Energy
missing_from_drawing.note: While 'EXISTING DUCTS' and 'NEW HV TRENCH' symbols exist in the legend, there is no specific legend symbol or drawing element explicitly representing a 'spare HV duct' provision as referenced in Fact Sheet 11. No new HV duct installation is confirmed as depicted in the site plan data provided.

missing_from_drawing.design_brief_reference: Determination of Funding, page 4 - customer reimbursement
missing_from_drawing.note: This is a financial/administrative charge item. There is no corresponding drawing element or legend symbol that represents a duct usage charge. It cannot be visually depicted on a site plan and is entirely absent from the drawing scope.

missing_from_drawing.design_brief_reference: Determination of Funding, page 4 - customer funded non-contestable works
missing_from_drawing.note: No legend symbol or site plan element explicitly represents network switching operations. While 'HV ABS (N/C)' and 'HV USL (N/C)' symbols exist in the legend, no specific switching asset or switching location appears to be called out in the site plan data provided, leaving this scope unaccounted for in the drawing.

missing_from_drawing.design_brief_reference: Determination of Funding, page 4 - customer funded non-contestable works; also referenced in sub-step-extract-substation commissioning_responsibilities
missing_from_drawing.note: Substation commissioning is referenced in the Design Brief but no substation asset (e.g., PADMOUNT SUBSTATION or POLE SUBSTATION symbol) is identified in the site plan data as being new or subject to commissioning. The legend contains both substation symbols, but no corresponding site plan element confirms a substation is within scope of this project's drawing.

missing_from_drawing.design_brief_reference: Determination of Funding, page 4 - customer funded non-contestable works
missing_from_drawing.note: Contract inspection is an administrative/procedural activity. There is no corresponding legend symbol or drawing element that represents this work item. It is entirely absent from the drawing scope.

missing_from_drawing.item: New OH road crossing service connection
missing_from_drawing.design_brief_reference: Method Of Supply Requirement, page 2 - LV Service Connections (customer funded contestable works)
missing_from_drawing.note: The Design Brief references a new OH road crossing service connection to maintain existing services. While 'STRING NEW OH CABLE' symbol exists in the legend, no specific road crossing service connection element is explicitly identified or annotated in the site plan data provided, leaving this specific scope item unconfirmed in the drawing.

missing_from_drawing.item: Land Interests / Easements as per Land Interest Guidelines (LIG)
missing_from_drawing.note: The Design Brief explicitly states that Land Interests as per the LIG are required for this project. While 'ENDEAVOUR ENERGY EASEMENT' (Faint light grey medium dashed line) exists as a legend symbol, no easement boundary is confirmed as shown in the site plan data, and no funding category is explicitly assigned to easement acquisition costs in the funding determination items.

funding_arrangement_comparison.summary: Of the funded work items identified in the Design Brief, the LV cable removal and new OH cable stringing works have reasonable correspondence to legend symbols in the drawing (REMOVE CONDUCTOR, STRING NEW OH CABLE, EXISTING POLE, NEW POLE). However, five items are entirely absent or unaccounted for in the drawing scope: (1) the spare HV duct provision per Fact Sheet 11 lacks explicit depiction, (2) the duct usage charge is a financial item with no drawable equivalent, (3) network switching has no confirmed switching asset shown in the site plan, (4) substation commissioning has no new or modified substation asset identified in the drawing, and (5) contract inspection is an administrative activity not representable on a drawing. Additionally, the new OH road crossing service connection referenced in LV works and the required land interests/easements per the LIG are referenced in the Design Brief but not confirmed in the site plan data provided. Overall, the drawing accounts for the physical LV cable works but leaves the HV duct, switching, substation, inspection, and administrative funding items visually unrepresented.
